description: IMDb provides entertainment metadata and related data products for titles, names, ratings, and box office information. Its developer offering includes real-time API access and bulk datasets distributed via AWS Data Exchange.
summary: IMDb exposes one developer integration surface on its own domain: documentation for a GraphQL API delivered through AWS Data Exchange, authenticated with both an IMDb-issued API key and AWS SigV4 credentials; no IMDb-hosted REST API, CLI, or MCP server was found.
